# MASTER SERVICES AGREEMENT: CLOUD-X PLATFORM (v2026.4)

## SECTION 8: LIMITATION OF LIABILITY

8.1 General Cap. EXCEPT FOR THE EXCLUSIONS SET FORTH IN SECTION 8.2, IN NO EVENT SHALL EITHER PARTY’S AGGREGATE LIABILITY ARISING OUT OF OR RELATED TO THIS AGREEMENT, WHETHER IN CONTRACT, TORT OR UNDER ANY OTHER THEORY OF LIABILITY, EXCEED THE TOTAL AMOUNT PAID BY CUSTOMER HEREUNDER IN THE TWELVE MONTHS PRECEDING THE INCIDENT.

8.2 Exclusions. The limitations set forth in Section 8.1 shall not apply to: (a) a party’s indemnification obligations under Section 9; (b) damages arising from a party’s breach of its confidentiality obligations; or (c) damages arising from a party’s gross negligence or willful misconduct.

8.3 Specific Carve-out for Data Breaches. Notwithstanding Section 8.1, in the event of a verified Security Incident involving Unauthorized Access to Customer Data, the liability cap shall be increased to three times (3x) the total amount paid by Customer in the preceding twelve months. **This specific enhancement only applies if the Customer has implemented Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) across all administrative accounts.** Failure to maintain MFA constitutes a waiver of this enhanced cap.

## SECTION 9: INDEMNIFICATION

9.1 Provider Indemnification. Provider shall defend Customer against any claim, demand, suit or proceeding made or brought against Customer by a third party alleging that the use of the Services as permitted hereunder infringes or misappropriates the intellectual property rights of a third party.
